title: SkipNight
description: Skip the night without needing all players
body:
# SkipNight

A lightweight Minecraft plugin that lets you skip the night when only a percentage of players are sleeping.  
Perfect for servers running Minecraft **1.7 to 1.16**, where the `/gamerule playersSleepingPercentage` does not exist yet.

## Features
- Skip the night when 50% or more players are sleeping
- Displays nice messages when players go to bed or leave
- Works on Spigot and Paper
- Automatically disables on 1.17+

## Compatibility
✅ Minecraft: 1.7.10 → 1.16.5  
❌ Not needed on 1.17+ (already built-in)

## How to use
1. Drop the `.jar` into your `plugins/` folder
2. Start your server
3. Done!

## Future roadmap
- Configurable percentage
- Custom messages
